name: Chipotle Sauce- Hot!!
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes, or until thickened.
5. Remove from heat and transfer to a blender.
6. Blend thoroughly until smooth.
